query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.providerName,
  s.phoneNumber, s.customerName, s.customerExternalId, s.supplierAccount,
  s.monthlyCost, s.status, s.notes
FROM services s
WHERE s.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '')
  AND s.status != 'billing_platform_stub'
ORDER BY s.planName
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

  s.phoneNumber, s.customerName, s.customerExternalId, s.supplierAccount,
  s.monthlyCost, s.status, s.notes
FROM services s
WHERE s.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '')
  AND s.status != 'billing_platform_stub'
ORDER BY s.planName
LIMIT 20;
